name: Oracle DB 中间件基线 (CIS Oracle 19c + 等保 2.0)

rules.title: 禁用 default password 账户
rules.description: system/manager 等默认账户必须改密或锁定

param: sqlplus -s / as sysdba <<< 'set head off; select count(*) from dba_users_with_defpwd;'

fix.suggestion: alter user <u> identified by <strong>; 或 alter user <u> account lock;

param: sqlplus -s / as sysdba <<< "set head off; select password_verify_function from dba_profiles where profile='DEFAULT' and resource_name='PASSWORD_VERIFY_FUNCTION';"

fix.suggestion: alter profile default limit password_verify_function ora12c_verify_function;

param: sqlplus -s / as sysdba <<< "set head off; select limit from dba_profiles where profile='DEFAULT' and resource_name='FAILED_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS';"
sqlplus -s / as sysdba <<< "set head off; select limit from dba_profiles where profile='DEFAULT' and resource_name='PASSWORD_LIFE_TIME';"

rules.title: PUBLIC 不应有敏感包执行权

param: sqlplus -s / as sysdba <<< "set head off; select count(*) from dba_tab_privs where grantee='PUBLIC' and table_name in ('UTL_FILE','UTL_HTTP','UTL_TCP','DBMS_LOB');"

fix.suggestion: revoke execute on UTL_FILE from public; (其它同)

param: sqlplus -s / as sysdba <<< "set head off; show parameter audit_trail;"

fix.suggestion: alter system set audit_trail=db,extended scope=spfile; reboot

param: sqlplus -s / as sysdba <<< "set head off; show parameter audit_sys_operations;"

fix.suggestion: alter system set audit_sys_operations=true scope=spfile; reboot

rules.title: 审计敏感对象 (USER/ROLE/PRIVILEGE)
rules.description: 对账户/权限变更必须审计

param: sqlplus -s / as sysdba <<< "set head off; select count(*) from dba_stmt_audit_opts where audit_option in ('CREATE USER','ALTER USER','GRANT','REVOKE','CREATE ROLE');"

fix.suggestion: audit create user, alter user, grant, revoke, create role;
